$comment: Capability profiles, lifecycle stages, and staffing scales — the three axes every wave gates on. A project's config.json declares `profile` (capability bundle), `stage` (lifecycle position), and `staffing` (studio scale). resolve-project returns all three; each wave checks meta.requires[] against capabilities, its stages[] guard against stage, and may collapse specialist fan-outs per staffing.

capabilities.gameplay: C++/GAS runtime code (abilities, attributes, subsystems, components)
capabilities.content: Blueprints, UMG widgets, Data Assets/Tables — the BP-side surface
capabilities.narrative: dialogue, quests, audio logs, story beats
capabilities.monetization: storefront transactions (Steam MicroTxn / EOS Ecom / console)
capabilities.build: cook/package pipeline is owned (post-scaffold projects always have this)
capabilities.steam: ships on Steam (store review, Deck Verified applies)

stages.$comment: Ordered lifecycle. Transitions ONLY happen through greenlight/gate waves, which append to config.json's stage_history. Waves declare which stages they run in; out-of-stage waves self-skip. concept + preproduction run in a docs-only repo (no .uproject until scaffold-wave, which preproduction-exit triggers).

gates.preproduction -> vertical-slice: preproduction-exit-wave (GDD + macro design + tech plan locked; triggers scaffold-wave)
gates.vertical-slice -> production: slice-greenlight-wave (verdict strictly against criteria locked by slice-criteria-wave)
gates.alpha -> beta: beta-gate-wave (content complete after content-lock-wave; debug-only regime)
gates.beta -> gold: rc-wave (100% Sev-1 / 90% Sev-2 / 85% Sev-3 fixed; cert-preflight go)
gates.gold -> live: release-wave ready + HUMAN publishes (the harness never presses release)

staffing.$comment: Studio scale — controls how far waves fan out. Waves always address ROLES; at smaller scales several roles are played by one agent. Merge order (which specialists collapse first, per industry research): editor->writer, encounter->level, economy->systems, ux+ui->one, vfx+lighting->art-tech, composer+sound->audio-designer, build->tools, CD+GD->design-director.
